name: diagnose-ui-glitch
description: Video-forensic UI bug diagnosis: drives Chrome to record a .webm of an interaction, finds the first frame where behavior diverges from what should happen, diagnoses the cause with time-aligned DevTools signals (console, network, computed style, trace), proposes a fix, and re-records to prove the glitch is gone. For motion/timing defects a screenshot cannot capture. Bundles a Playwright capture harness and an ffmpeg two-pass frame extractor.
